brief: Maintainer cockpit highlights one priority cluster around onboarding friction, CI confusion, and repeated docs questions. Suggested response is a fast docs patch, one pinned issue for setup, and a clearer division between roadmap discussion and support traffic.
compositionNote: The cockpit starts as intake plus triage, but the real Bonfyre move is what comes after: the same artifacts can feed bonfyre-query, bonfyre-graph, bonfyre-queue, and bonfyre-sync without rebuilding the maintainer workflow from scratch.

outputNotes.triage summary: bonfyre-brief gives maintainers one compact view of the current issue cluster so they can decide before they dive into every thread.
outputNotes.priority tags: bonfyre-tag adds a lightweight operational layer on top of the same intake artifact, which means priority can be inferred and revised without changing the source record.
outputNotes.semantic issue memory: bonfyre-embed turns maintainer inputs into a memory surface that can later be searched semantically instead of only by labels or exact strings.
outputNotes.maintainer digest: bonfyre-emit turns the triage state into a shareable digest for async review, handoff, or weekly maintainer rhythm.
